arts.ttl: Juventus eye Skriniar as Luis Enrique states: “When you don’t play, you’re unhappy”
arts.sum: Milan Skriniar remains Juve’s prime target as they look to reinforce a beleaguered back-line. The former Inter Milan centre-back, now at Paris Saint-Germain, has found himself on the fringes of the team, making only four appearances this season, with just three as a starter. Calciomercato report how Skriniar’s situation at PSG has become increasingly frustrating for the player. He has been consistently left on the bench during Champions League matches, where the Parisian club has struggled, securing only one win in four games. arts.ttl: Nuno Mendes and Senny Mayulu absent for PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be without Nuno Mendes (22) and Senny Mayulu (18) for Friday night’s encounter against Toulouse FC. Mayulu’s period of absence is estimated at two weeks, meaning that…

arts.ttl: Man Utd IN TALKS to sign PSG star on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United are in talks with Paris Saint-Germain over a possible loan deal for Randal Kolo-Muani, according to reports. French outlet Le10sport have reported that the Premier League giants are looking to bring the out-of-favour Frenchman on loan.

arts.ttl: Torino gem Ciammaglichella being tracked by PSG
arts.sum: Aaron Ciammaglichella’s journey with Torino began at the tender age of four and a half, marking the start of a remarkable ascent through the club’s youth ranks. Now 19, the talented midfielder has already achieved milestones that many players can only dream of: playing for the Primavera team at 16, earning his first senior squad call-up at 18, and making his Serie A debut at 19 in a 2-1 victory against Atalanta last August. arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani’s role at Paris Saint-Germain appears limited, as manager Luis Enrique has shown little interest in making him the team’s starting No. 9. Amid the uncertainty, a new report suggests a Premier League club has already made contact regarding the French forward. arts.ttl: Manchester United Push to Outbid PSG for Rising Defensive Talent
arts.sum: Under sporting advisor Luis Campos, Paris Saint-Germain has forged a solid relationship with Portuguese clubs, bringing in top talents like Vitinha, João Neves, Nuno Mendes, and Gonçalo Ramos. Now, PSG looks set to make another move or two in that direction. The club’s transfer strategy focuses on signing promising young players before they reach their […] The post Manchester United Push to Outbid PSG for Rising Defensive Talent appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: CorSport: Juventus consider Fagioli’s future amid PSG and Premier League interest
arts.sum: Nicolò Fagioli’s future at Juventus has become a subject of speculation as the January transfer window approaches. The 23-year-old midfielder’s recent bench appearances have sparked discussions within the club, leading to potential considerations for his departure. Corriere dello Sport (via IlBianconero) report how Juventus find themselves in need of reinforcements, particularly in defense and attack, due to recent injuries. This situation has prompted the club to explore the possibility of making at least a couple of signings in January. To facilitate these moves, Juventus may need to make a sacrifice, and Fagioli could be the player to make way. arts.sum: Several European clubs are showing interest in Sporting Lisbon’s standout Viktor Gyökeres as 2025 approaches. However, despite the growing buzz around the Swedish forward, one French football pundit remains skeptical.
